organisation.name: Pure Unity Health
organisation.overview: Pure Unity Health has been a leading NHS partner providing First Contact Practitioners and wider clinical services integrating with Primary Care since 2016.
organisation.missionFocus: Our services focus on collaborative, community-based solutions integrating closely with Primary Care Networks, Neighbourhood teams, GP Federations and ICB’s.

services.approach: Our experienced teams of First Contact Physiotherapists, Health and Wellbeing Coaches and Social Prescribers all aim to prioritise prevention to support long-term well-being and health before illness takes hold.

careModel.description: We work collaboratively helping to deliver scalable, community-integrated care models, optimising clinical pathways with data intelligence, and significantly enhancing population health through preventative strategies.

specialistPainServices.background: Our long experience of working with MSK patients with persistent pain has led us to develop a scalable, evidence-based Long-Term Conditions Coaching Service and a dedicated Primary Care Pain Support service fully reimbursable via ARRS and targeted at people who attend primary care with persistent pain, with the ambition of addressing risk factors earlier.

programmes.name: Long-Term Conditions Coaching Service
programmes.description: A scalable, evidence-based service developed from extensive experience supporting MSK patients with persistent pain.

programmes.name: Primary Care Pain Support Service
programmes.description: A dedicated service fully reimbursable via ARRS, targeted at people who attend primary care with persistent pain, with the ambition of addressing risk factors earlier.

serviceDesign.structure: Our comprehensive modular pain service is based on individual patient needs to facilitate long term, meaningful change.
serviceDesign.aim: To address risk factors earlier and support sustainable improvement for individuals living with persistent pain.

philosophy.corePrinciple: Our key focus is to empower people to manage persistent pain in a way which allows them to have control and ownership of the challenges they may face.
goals: Reduced demand on the healthcare system
